reasoning: The element is a large beige/cream card centered on screen with a circular attack icon inside. Locatability is strong — the high-contrast light card against dark teal tiles makes it instantly spottable within 0.5s. Silhouette is clear and it does not blend into background tiles. However, the beige/cream card background is entirely foreign to the game's visual language: the game uses dark HUD panels, dark tiles, and bright saturated buttons (blue, orange, green). The flat light card reads as 'pasted on' rather than native. The circular icon itself is pixel-art and has some Echoes feel, but it occupies only ~40% of the card area, leaving large empty beige margins that amplify the pasted look. Edges are hard-cut with no blending into the scene. No tonal continuity with existing UI elements. Echoes-cleanliness fails because the palette intrusion creates visual noise against an otherwise dark, coherent aesthetic.
